Tests if converting a new Object to a Number results in a "number" type.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the type conversion functionality of JavaScript. It verifies that when a new `Object` is passed to the `Number` constructor, the result is of type `number`. The use of `assert` ensures that the condition is true, and if not, it will throw an error. This test is narrow in scope, focusing specifically on the behavior of type conversion from an `Object` to a `number`.
